MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-23-2024 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed Motion for Summary Judgment is granted.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-29-2024 Continued To Apr-05-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. GREGORY J. LEWIS, Esq. of Hassard Bonnington LLP (tel: 415-288-9800) for Defendant.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Matter discussed. Counsel Lewis provides the Court with courtesy copies in open Court. The Court continues the matter to April 5, 2024 at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JOSEPH BRAVO, Esq. of Bravo Law Offices (Tel: 415-512-6700) for Plaintiff Angela Edwards.
Atty. GREGORY LEWIS, Esq. of Hassard Bonnington for Defendants the Regents of the University of California.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ANGELA EDWARDS' MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Matter discussed. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants Plaintiff's motion for withdrawal of attorney of record.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
